notes.riper_execute_gate: RIPER-5 EXECUTE mode requires explicit ENTER EXECUTE MODE — do not use --force/--yolo to bypass plan approval for substantial work.
notes.user_override: Project permissions merge with ~/.cursor/cli-config.json. Adjust there for personal defaults.
notes.headless: For CI: agent -p --mode=agent from repo root so .cursor/hooks.json and rules load.
